about: I am Ronit Soni, a Full Stack Developer from India who specializes in the MERN stack.
I enjoy building modern web applications, AI-powered tools, and responsive user interfaces.
Currently, I am working as a Virtual Intern at Algonive, focusing on building production-ready applications and improving my system design skills.
skills: Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Tailwind
Tools: Git, GitHub, Docker, VS Code, Postman
Other: REST APIs, Responsive Design, UI/UX fundamentals
experience: Virtual Intern at Algonive, focusing on building production-ready applications and improving system design skills.
projects: SpaceX Clone: A responsive clone of the SpaceX website built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with modern UI sections.
Slice Clone: A fintech landing page inspired by the Slice banking platform, focusing on UI design.
Dorje Teas Clone: A brand-style website clone with product sections and responsive navigation.
Proxgy Clone: A modern static landing page clone focusing on layout structure.
News App: A dynamic news application fetching real-time news using a public API.
Myntra Clone: A React-based e-commerce UI clone with product listing and routing.

fun: I actively participate in hackathons to push my creativity and problem-solving skills.
Some of my hackathon projects include rapid prototypes built with Next.js, Node.js, and various AI APIs.
Hackathons are a great way for me to collaborate with other developers and learn new technologies under tight deadlines.
